sections.paragraph:
Original: עדה

Transliteration: ‛âdâh

Phonetic: aw-daw'

BDB Definition:

Adah = "ornament"
  1. the 1st of the 2 wives of Lamech and mother of Jabal and Jubal
  2. a Hittitess, 1 of the 3 wives of Esau and mother of Eliphaz
    1. also called 'Bashemath'

Origin: from H5710

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
